_meta.purpose: Swappable content. Brand voice defaults populated from senior-dev defaults + COMPETITIVE-INTEL.md patterns. When the client intake form returns, values here get swapped in-place with no DOM changes required.
_meta.voice: Bold. Blue-collar creative. Neon-industrial-Appalachian. Plain-spoken with a little fight in it. Zero corporate sheen.

brand.name: Hatfield & McCoy DTF
brand.story_short: Custom DTF heat transfers, gang sheets, sublimation, and specialty prints — pressed in the hills of Virginia and shipped wherever the order goes. No pretreatment. No minimums. No runaround.
brand.story_long: We took a name built on rivalry and put it to work. Hatfield & McCoy DTF runs out of Virginia, printing the kind of transfers small shops, teams, and makers actually need: clean edges, stretched-to-hell color, no fade, no crack, no peel. We don't chase the bulk-corporate game. We chase clean prints. Every sheet that leaves the shop earns its place on the press, or it doesn't ship. Cotton, polyester, blends, nylon, leather — if you can press it, we can print it. Upload your art, pick your size, and watch it land at your door in a day or two. That's the whole deal.

tat.note: All TAT starts when your art and payment clear.

shipping.policy: Flat-rate USPS and UPS shipping. Local pickup available in Virginia.
shipping.packaging: Flat sheets ship rolled or flat-packed between stiff boards. Larger rolls go in a tube.
shipping.international: Reach out for international quotes. We can ship most places.

hero.lede: Custom DTF heat transfers, gang sheets, sublimation, and glow-in-the-dark specialties — pressed in the hills of Virginia and shipped everywhere. No pretreatment. No minimums. No feud between you and a clean print.

story_section.headline_line_1: One last feud the mountains will settle —
story_section.paragraph: We took a name built on rivalry and put it to work. Every sheet that leaves the shop has to earn its place on the press — clean edges, stretched to hell, no fade, no peel. If it doesn't pass our feud, it doesn't ship. Simple as that.

armory.headline: Pick your weapon.
armory.subhead: Seven live categories pulled straight from the press room. Every transfer we run, priced by size, ready to ship.

steps.title: Upload
steps.desc: Send us your art. PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50 MB. Transparent PNG at 300 DPI gives the cleanest print.

steps.title: Print
steps.desc: We run it on the press the next morning. Clean registration, dead-true color, fast cure. In-stock transfers ship in 24–48 hours.

steps.title: Press
steps.desc: 300°F, medium pressure, 10–15 seconds. Peel warm or cold depending on the film. Instructions ship with every order.

comparison_table.headline: Why shops switch to us.
rows: Prints on cotton, poly, blends, leather

faq.question: How long does production take?
faq.answer: In-stock transfers ship in 24–48 hours. Custom gang sheets take 48–72 hours. Order before 3PM for same-day pickup if you're local.

faq.question: Is there a minimum order?
faq.answer: No minimum on any transfer. One sheet is fine. Run one, run a hundred — same clean quality either way.

faq.question: What file formats do you accept?
faq.answer: PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, and EPS up to 50 MB. Transparent PNG at 300 DPI gives the cleanest print. If your file's not there yet, send what you've got and we'll help you clean it up.

faq.question: How do I press my transfer?
faq.answer: Heat press to 300°F, medium pressure, 10–15 seconds. Peel warm or cold depending on the film. Full instructions ship with every order — we also send a PDF if you prefer.

faq.question: Is it hot peel or cold peel?
faq.answer: Our standard DTF is a warm peel. Glow and glitter films are cold peel. Every order ships with peel-type instructions so you're not guessing.

faq.question: How durable are the prints?
faq.answer: Tested past 40 washes on cotton with no fade, crack, or peel. Wash inside-out, cold, tumble low. That's it. No special detergent, no drip-line rules.

faq.question: How much is shipping, and do you offer local pickup?
faq.answer: Flat-rate USPS or UPS — you'll see the exact number at checkout based on sheet size. Local pickup is free in Virginia if you order before 3PM. We'll email you when it's ready to grab.

faq.question: Can I cancel or change an order after I place it?
faq.answer: Before we print: yes, reach out fast and we'll stop the press. After we print: the sheet is yours. Email us quick and we'll do what we can.

reviews.summary_line: 47+ shops running our transfers. Zero complaints on wash durability.

featured.quote: Colors didn't fade after 40 washes. Best transfers we've run.
featured.author: Rowan B.

featured.quote: Ordered Friday, picked up Monday. Clean edges, dead-true color. Switching our whole shop over.
featured.author: Mara K.

featured.quote: Glow DTF held up through a 5K and two washes. My runners were stoked.

footer.tagline: Neon-lit heat transfers, pressed in Virginia. Run loud, run proud, ship fast.

form_errors.network_offline: You're offline. Reconnect and try again — your answers are saved.
form_errors.timeout: Took too long to send. Your answers are saved — try again when you're ready.
form_errors.webhook_error: Couldn't reach the server. Your answers are saved — try again in a minute.
form_errors.validation_email: Please enter a valid email address.
form_errors.validation_email_and_name: We need your name and email so we can follow up.
form_errors.spam_cooldown: One sec — please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.
form_errors.spam_cooldown_generic: Hang on — please wait a moment before sending again.
form_errors.payload_too_large: That's a lot of text. Trimming to fit — the gist still gets through.
form_errors.generic: Something went sideways. Try again in a minute.

form_success.thanks_body: Your answers landed in our inbox. We'll pick this up and have the next draft of your store ready within a few days.
